statements.impact_statement: Stack exhaustion DoS in json-smart via unlimited recursive parsing of deeply nested JSON arrays and objects. Requires parsing attacker-controlled untrusted JSON input. Liquibase is a CLI tool that only processes JSON from local operator-controlled configuration files and database metadata. No network-facing JSON parsing surface exists.

Stack exhaustion DoS in json-smart via deeply nested JSON with many { characters (incomplete fix for CVE-2023-1370). Requires parsing attacker-controlled untrusted JSON input. Liquibase is a CLI tool that only processes JSON from local operator-controlled configuration files and database metadata. No network-facing JSON parsing surface exists.
